---
title: "Hayato Umetani"
---

I am a PhD student at Kobe University, Japan.
My research interests include Development Economics and Environmental Economics.

## Upcoming Presentations

- ~~**Mar, 8**, International Workshop on Environmental Economics, *Keio University*~~
- ~~**Apr, 11**, Musashi Research Workshop, *Musashi University*~~
- ~~**May, 25**, Japanese Economic Association, *Tokyo Keizai University*~~
